title: Supervise irrigation system maintenance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise irrigation system maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a maintenance program for an irrigation system

pcs.text: Establish the maintenance requirements for the irrigation site, components and structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the maintenance requirements for the irrigation site, components and structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the maintenance requirements for the irrigation site, components and structures.

pcs.text: Determine the frequency of maintenance activities required and develop a schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the frequency of maintenance activities required and develop a schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the frequency of maintenance activities required and develop a schedule.

pcs.text: Identify and quantify total maintenance costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and quantify total maintenance costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and quantify total maintenance costs.

pcs.text: Assess the workplace health and safety risks associated with the maintenance program and implement suitable controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the workplace health and safety risks associated with the maintenance program and implement suitable controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the workplace health and safety risks associated with the maintenance program and implement suitable controls.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of irrigation system maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Develop a system for reporting maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a system for reporting maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a system for reporting maintenance activities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and investigate abnormal operation or frequent and recurring breakdowns and organise maintenance as required.
